title: better fight
description: Give player a better fight, villager can fight to mobs too.
body:
# Better fight made by zhengzhengyiyi

### Mob fighting
1. villager can fight to others ```HostileEntity```.
2. Ghast can fight to ```VillagerEntity``` now.

---

### Player fighting
1. Using ```player.setVelocity()``` to add force when player is using diamond sword to hit entity.
2. There is a cool down for moving hit

---
